name: the v1.1 profile grounded_in is a strict superset of the v1.0 universal profile grounded_in
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/business-intake.sh" --answers p.json --partial --out v10.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "React SPA on Kubernetes" --answers p.json --probe-answer react_rendering_model=spa --partial --out v11.json --now 2026-07-04T00:00:00Z >/dev/null 2>&1; ruby -rjson -e 'a=JSON.parse(File.read("v10.json"))["grounded_in"]||[]; b=JSON.parse(File.read("v11.json"))["grounded_in"]||[]; exit((a-b).empty? && b.length>a.length ? 0:1)' && echo strict-superset 1>&2
setup: printf '%s' '{"workload":"React SPA with REST API on Kubernetes via Terraform","motivation":"revenue","criticality":"mission-critical","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"soc2","scale":"large","budget_posture":"balanced"}' > p.json
